unit: D1: Apply skill audit frontmatter flips

contract.goal: Audit every local skill in .claude/skills/ against the two-axis rubric (disable-model-invocation × user-invocable) and apply frontmatter flips so each is classified correctly per PLAN.md Phase 3. D1 of 3 in Phase 3 (D2 is the /loom-archive grill-me reshape).
acceptance_criteria: Every local skill's frontmatter explicitly carries both flags after the audit — no implicit ambient skills.
Substrate primitives (guild-spawn/validate/whiteboard) → user-invocable: false + disable-model-invocation: true (rubric D).
ev-loop-* → user-invocable: true + disable-model-invocation: true (composed via Skill from /ev-run, not ambient).
User-facing synthesis skills (a11y-review-file, draft-plan, review-skill) → both true (rubric C → A).
ev-run gains explicit user-invocable: true for consistency.
griot-compact + loom-archive untouched (already correct, rubric A).
No deletions (no rubric-B candidates after Phase 1 killed griot-capture + griot-report).
rules_applied: Two-axis rubric is the classification frame (PLAN.md Decision pin).
Substrate primitives pinned disable-model-invocation: true always (D).
Frontmatter-only edits; no body prose touched.
Sibling consistency: every local skill gains both flags explicitly (no implicit defaults).
disqualifiers: Edit any skill body prose beyond frontmatter.
Change frontmatter fields other than user-invocable / disable-model-invocation.

actions: Cut substrate-cli/phase-3 branch from main (now at bf96317 post-#100).
Updated manifest: P2 PR state flipped open → merged; P3 status → in-progress on branch substrate-cli/phase-3.
Read frontmatter of all 11 local skills.
Classified each on the two-axis rubric (per the audit table in checkin notes).

Applied 9 frontmatter edits: 3 user-invocable + disable-model-invocation pairs (a11y-review-file, draft-plan, review-skill); 2 ev-loop-* gain both flags; 3 guild-* gain disable-model-invocation: true; ev-run gains explicit user-invocable: true.
Verified on-disk state via grep — every local skill carries explicit disable-model-invocation now.
Ran npm run lint: clean. Ran npm test: 35 files / 470 tests pass (no behavioral test impact).
Spawned evaluator-contract-fit (single-evaluator panel per PANEL-COMPOSITION.md for substrate skill bodies). VERDICT: approved.

changes_since_previous: First checkin on substrate-cli/phase-3 branch. Baseline: origin/main at bf96317 (post-#100 squash merge).
notes_for_pr: - ev-run: was disable-model-invocation: true only → gain explicit user-invocable: true (hygiene).
- a11y-review-file, draft-plan, review-skill: were rubric C (default ambient + user-invocable) → flipped to A (both flags explicit + true).
- ev-loop-confidence, ev-loop-interactive: were rubric C → flipped to A. They're composed via Skill tool from /ev-run; user can also manually dispatch.
- guild-spawn, guild-validate, guild-whiteboard: were rubric D-pending (user-invocable: false but disable-model-invocation unset) → pinned disable-model-invocation: true (rubric D).

Surviving local skill count: 11 (target was ~12; we're under). The two ambient noise candidates the PLAN.md target named — /griot-capture + /griot-report — were already killed in Phase 1 D4. No rubric-B candidates remain.

Substrate-quirk observation (mirrors L-004): Claude Code caches the skills registry at session start, so this session's 'available skills' reminder still shows pre-flip state for some skills. On-disk state is correct; next session pulls the new classifications. Not blocking.
